$comment: OPTIONAL real field-recording sources for `npm run fetch:ambient`. The built-in library already
ships SYNTHESIZED ambient loops (rain/ocean/wind/fire/fan/womb/heartbeat via pipeline/bake.js) with
no license concern — this download path is only if you want actual recordings.
PERSONAL, NON-COMMERCIAL USE: the gate is relaxed — CC0/PD/CC-BY/CC-BY-NC/CC-BY-SA are all fine for
your own home (only NoDerivatives is refused, since we loop/transcode). Still: (1) fill in a direct
`url` + real `sha256` and set "cleared": true (uncleared entries are skipped); (2) do NOT commit the
downloaded audio to a public repo — that's redistribution regardless of personal use; (3) needs ffmpeg.

items.label: Ocean waves
items.sourceUrl: https://freesound.org/ (felix.blume CC0 ocean — verify per-ID `license`; download once, vendor)

items.label: Fireplace
items.sourceUrl: https://opengameart.org/ ("Fireplace Sound loop", CC0) OR Freesound samarobryn 414767 (CC0)

items.label: Gentle stream
items.sourceUrl: https://github.com/rafaelmardojai/blanket ("Stream", CC0 — pin a commit SHA)

items.label: Wind
items.sourceUrl: https://github.com/Muges/ambientsounds (wind = felix.blume 139337, CC0 — pin a commit SHA)
